title: Expedition to the Forgotten Temple
description: Assemble allies, choose your path, and reach the ancient temple before your strength fails.

beacons.name: The Keeper's Offer
beacons.description: The Keeper of Knowledge offers you a choice of three items to aid your quest: a detailed map, a magical compass, or extra supplies.

beacons.name: The Map
beacons.description: You take the ancient map, which reveals hidden paths through the wilderness.

beacons.name: The Compass
beacons.description: You take the magical compass, which always points toward your goal.

beacons.name: The Supplies
beacons.description: You take the extra supplies, ensuring you can endure longer hardships.

beacons.name: The Keeper's Blessing
beacons.description: The Keeper entrusts you with the mission to retrieve the Orb of Ages from the Forgotten Temple. You decide to go to the town tavern before traveling.

beacons.name: The City's Factions
beacons.description: At the tavern, you learn of three factions who might help: the Mages' Guild, the Warriors' Brotherhood, and the Merchant Consortium. You can offer your aid to earn their support.

beacons.name: Aid the Mages
beacons.description: You assist the mages in recovering a lost scroll. They reward you with a protective charm and knowledge of arcane paths.

beacons.name: Aid the Warriors
beacons.description: You clear a nest of beasts threatening the warriors' keep. They grant you a stout shield and a guide who knows the wilds.

beacons.name: Aid the Merchant
beacons.description: You negotiate a trade deal for the merchant, who in return supplies you with rare provisions and gold.

beacons.name: Departing the City
beacons.description: You set out from the city walls. Ahead lie two routes: the Whispering Forest or the Sunken Catacombs.

beacons.name: Through the Whispering Forest (Safe)
beacons.description: The forest is dense, but your compass or ranger guide leads you safely through.

beacons.name: Through the Whispering Forest (Hardship)
beacons.description: The forest is disorienting. Without a guide or compass, you stumble through, exhausted and wounded.

beacons.name: Beneath the Sunken Catacombs (Safe)
beacons.description: The magic charm or ancient map lights your way through the catacombs, avoiding its deadliest traps.

beacons.name: Beneath the Sunken Catacombs (Hardship)
beacons.description: The darkness overwhelms you. Without a map or charm, you blunder into traps and emerge battered.

beacons.name: Crossroads
beacons.description: You reach a clearing with an ancient shrine. A hidden cache lies nearby, but the temple is just ahead. Time and strength are pressing.

beacons.name: A Safe Discovery
beacons.description: You locate the cache without incident. It contains valuable relics and fresh supplies that renew your strength.

beacons.name: A Costly Gamble
beacons.description: You find the cache, but the effort drains you completely. You gain relics, but your body is battered.

beacons.name: Approaching the Forgotten Temple
beacons.description: The temple looms before you. The final challenge awaits. How you have prepared will decide your fate.

beacons.name: The Final Decision
beacons.description: You stand at the threshold. The Orb is within reach, but your choices echo. The agent chooses the outcome.

beacons.name: Champion of the Ages
beacons.description: With full strength and allies' blessings, you claim the Orb and are hailed as a hero.

beacons.name: A Bitter Success
beacons.description: You secure the Orb, but the cost is high. Your deeds are remembered, yet not sung.

beacons.name: Lost in the Dark
beacons.description: The temple swallows you. Your journey ends in silence, another forgotten soul.
